scripts.dev:https:no-open: node scripts/inject-api-url.js && WATCHPACK_POLLING=true CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=1 next dev --hostname 0.0.0.0 --experimental-https
scripts.dev:no-open: node scripts/inject-api-url.js && WATCHPACK_POLLING=true CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=1 next dev --hostname 0.0.0.0
scripts.dev:safe: node scripts/inject-api-url.js && (test -f .next/server/app/_not-found/page.js || npm run build) && WATCHPACK_POLLING=true CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=1 next dev --hostname 0.0.0.0
scripts.dev:clean: node scripts/inject-api-url.js && (rm -rf .next && WATCHPACK_POLLING=true CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=1 next dev --hostname 0.0.0.0)
